hooks.command: $data = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $data.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -match '\.java$') { Write-Host "=== Backend Test (triggered by: $f) ==="; Push-Location backend; .\.mvnw test -q 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 40; $ec = $LASTEXITCODE; Pop-Location; if ($ec -ne 0) { exit 2 } } elseif ($f -match '\.(jsx?|js)$') { Write-Host "=== Frontend Test (triggered by: $f) ==="; Push-Location frontend; npm test --watchAll=false --passWithNoTests 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 40; $ec = $LASTEXITCODE; Pop-Location; if ($ec -ne 0) { exit 2 } }
hooks.statusMessage: 테스트 실행 중... (실패 시 자동으로 알려드릴게요)

hooks.command: Write-Output '{"systemMessage": "✅ 작업 완료. 전체 테스트 확인: [백엔드] cd backend && .\mvnw test  |  [프론트] cd frontend && npm test --watchAll=false"}'
